citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 1:09pm on January
28,2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee via the phone number on file, leaving a voicemail message. The
licensee returned the inspector’s call, stating no one was available for an inspection today. Failure to provide access to
the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide
access is serious and may result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 1:09pm on January 
28,2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee via the phone number on file, leaving a voicemail message. The 
licensee returned the inspector’s call, stating no one was available for an inspection today. Failure to provide access to 
the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide 
access is serious and may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
